_meta.purpose: Per-playbook override list for the mode-kill epic (#566). Playbook IDs listed here route through the new evidence-aware gate (introduced in Step 3) instead of the legacy mode-based event-gate. Empty in Step 0 — no playbook is opted in yet. Step 3 adds the IELTS Speaking Practice playbook as the first canary.
_meta.rollback: Edit this file to [] and redeploy; mode gate resumes for all playbooks within 30 seconds.
